title: RAGForge
description: A professional Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system built with Streamlit, FAISS, and Ollama — no cloud, no data leaks. Fully Local. Fully Private.

title: DriveGate
description: The One-Way Entrance to Your Private Cloud. Upload files to your Google Drive from any device using just a 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

title: NullProtocol
description: Advanced reconnaissance and attack pipeline automator. Seamlessly integrate Nmap, Hydra, and Metasploit into a single, deadly workflow.

title: CyberSec Vault
description: Enterprise-grade digital safe for sensitive project credentials. Featuring AES-256 encryption, multi-factor authentication loops, and secure key derivation.

title: Facial Recognition Attendance System
description: Automated student attendance tracking using OpenCV and the face_recognition library with an SQLite database integration.

title: Stock Market Predictor
description: Predicts future stock prices using historical data and LSTM neural networks. Includes advanced data visualization.

title: Medical Imaging CNN
description: A convolutional neural network categorizing chest X-Rays for pneumonia identification with 95% accuracy.

title: Decentralized NFT Marketplace
description: Web3 application allowing users to mint, buy, and sell non-fungible tokens securely on the Ethereum network.

title: Defi Staking Platform
description: Smart contract system where users deposit tokens to earn yield over time. Fully audited algorithms.

title: Custom Cryptocurrency
description: An ERC-20 token contract featuring burning, minting roles, and custom governance parameters.

title: Blockchain Voting Protocol
description: Secure and transparent voting mechanism built purely through immutable ledger smart contracts to prevent fraud.

title: Discord Music Bot
description: A feature-rich discord bot capable of streaming music directly from YouTube and Spotify with priority queue management.

title: Web Scraper Toolkit
description: A high-concurrency web scraping tool utilizing proxies to gather massive datasets and output them to clean CSVs.

title: Automated Email Campaigner
description: A script that intelligently customizes and sends bulk emails via SMTP based on segmented recipient data.

title: Library Management System
description: A comprehensive console-based application for managing book inventories, student borrowing rules, and late fees.

title: Custom Raytracer
description: A 3D rendering engine built completely from scratch implementing ray tracing algorithms for realistic lighting and shadows.

title: Banking Record System
description: Terminal-based banking application supporting account creation, deposits, withdrawals, and persistent storage via binary files.

title: Pathfinding Visualizer
description: A graphical C++ tool visualizing how A* and Dijkstra's algorithms actively find the shortest path between nodes.

title: Hospital Management GUI
description: A complete Java Swing application for managing patient records, doctor appointments, and comprehensive billing generation.

title: Multiplayer Chess Game
description: A peer-to-peer multiplayer chess implementation using low-level Java Sockets for fast network communication over a LAN.

title: Employee Payroll System
description: An enterprise-style payroll calculator handling tax deductions, employee tiers, and automatic PDF payslip generation.

title: E-Commerce Backend API
description: Robust RESTful API built with Spring Boot covering secure user authentication, product catalogs, and order processing logs.

title: University Forum Portal
description: A responsive discussion platform where students can ask questions, share notes, and interact with professors contextually.

title: Real-time Chat Application
description: A modern chat app supporting direct messaging, group rooms, and real-time typing indicators with persistent message history.

title: Weather Dashboard
description: A sleek dashboard fetching 5-day weather forecasts from the OpenWeather API featuring interactive dynamic data charts.

title: Personal Portfolio Template
description: Customizable, SEO-optimized personal portfolio template enabling students to flawlessly showcase their resumes and projects.
